text.message: Oj do u still want brick wheat for wood?
I can 2:1 my sheep into a wood
where do you think i should have blocked?
he has a million other wheat
The 8 only hurts me in last it doesn’t even hurt him
he needs to 3-1 for it now
It wasn’t a revenge block lol
I’m trying to win the game
And I cannot win the game if the 8 is blocked
and how does blocking orange and i win the game
yeah youre too far from that
It communicates to u not to block the 8 in the future
you know the 8 sheep is the best block behind the 6 brick
you want the 6 wheat when he has the 5 and the 10
